localization.DH_IMPORTER.Tour.Title: Grim Libram for Foundry VTT
localization.DH_IMPORTER.Tour.Description: Learn how to set up the Grim Libram integration for importing Daggerheart adversaries.
localization.DH_IMPORTER.Tour.WelcomeContent:
Grim Libram for Foundry VTT lets you import Daggerheart adversaries and encounters directly from supported online sources into your world.

This short tour will walk you through the setup.
localization.DH_IMPORTER.Tour.ExtensionContent: To get started, install the Grim Libram browser extension for Chrome.
localization.DH_IMPORTER.Tour.ConnectContent: Once installed, use the extension's pop-up menu to connect to your Foundry tab. A green check-mark icon will appear, confirming the connection is established.
localization.DH_IMPORTER.Tour.SourcesContent: Grim Libram currently supports two sources: Grim Libram Compendium — browse to any encounter and use the import button to bring it into Foundry. Heart of Daggers — open an individual adversary and use the import option in its burger menu (☰).
localization.DH_IMPORTER.Tour.SettingsContent: You can configure the module under Game Settings → Module Settings → Grim Libram for Foundry VTT. By default, the module will match imported adversaries against the SRD compendium and use official data when available. Patreon supporters should also set an Art Storage Directory where generated art will be saved.
localization.DH_IMPORTER.Tour.PatreonContent: Patreon supporters get access to automatic token and avatar art generation for imported adversaries, with customizable border styles per adversary tier. Art generation only runs when an Art Storage Directory is configured in module settings. Without it, imports will skip art generation entirely. Visit grimlibram.com/vtt to learn more.
